summary: Record the post-runtime-wiring aggregate suite: all repository tests remain green with the AI activity bridge and per-hunk proposal review present.

decisions.decision: Retain one bounded repository-wide test run after runtime wiring; do not treat focused AI tests as a substitute for the aggregate suite.
decisions.rationale: The new Workbench bridge crosses the application/UI boundary, so the full 163-file suite is the relevant falsification pass while preserving the no-loop rule.

testEvidence.criterion: The full repository Vitest suite remains green after the AI runtime bridge and per-hunk diff wiring.
testEvidence.test: Run the one bounded aggregate test command after focused bridge/UI verification.

red.outcome: RED: the earlier aggregate run had two unrelated regression failures before the cache/localization repairs.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 163 passed (163); Tests 1246 passed (1246); Duration 19.30s.

questions: Hosted clean-browser AI evidence and remaining M4 release gates are still pending; aggregate local tests do not claim those external gates.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
